evaluation_protocol.note: The retained three-protocol surface is the accepted external-facing baseline evidence, with BO_3step_aggressive as the default active comparator.

metrics.label: 30-minute charged capacity
metrics.description: Charge throughput delivered within the 30-minute fast-charge window from 10% to 90% SOC.
metrics.derivation: Taken from the Q30 field of the default active baseline protocol BO_3step_aggressive in results/standard_baselines.json after rerunning the retained three-protocol baseline family in lumo.

metrics.label: Lithium plating loss
metrics.description: Capacity loss attributed to lithium plating under the accepted default active baseline protocol.
metrics.derivation: Taken from the plating_loss field of BO_3step_aggressive in results/standard_baselines.json after the trusted lumo rerun.

metrics.label: SEI thickness growth
metrics.description: SEI thickness growth accumulated during the accepted default active baseline protocol.
metrics.derivation: Taken from the sei_growth field of BO_3step_aggressive in results/standard_baselines.json after the trusted lumo rerun.

metrics.label: Total lithium inventory loss
metrics.description: Total lithium inventory loss during the accepted default active baseline protocol.
metrics.derivation: Taken from the total_lli field of BO_3step_aggressive in results/standard_baselines.json after the trusted lumo rerun.
